creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
On Thu, 06 Jun 2013, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of sysutils/userspace-rcu,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/179358 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/179358
> 
Works all fine, and besides addresses more little fixes I was about to do.
So thanks!

And just FYI: in the next week I will submit a maintainer update of the knot
port that was also addressed by this patch. Knot 1.3 rc 1 became available.


-- 

Met vriendelijke groet,
With kind regards,


Leo Vandewoestijne
